name: Cloud Firefox VPS
postCreateCommand:
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y software-properties-common && sudo add-apt-repository ppa:mozillateam/ppa -y && echo -e 'Package: *
Pin: release o=LP-PPA-mozillateam
Pin-Priority: 1001' | sudo tee /etc/apt/preferences.d/mozilla-firefox && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y firefox-esr libdbus-glib-1-2 && mkdir -p /home/vscode/.config/xfce4/autostart && echo -e '[Desktop Entry]
Type=Application
Exec=firefox-esr --no-sandbox
' > /home/vscode/.config/xfce4/autostart/firefox.desktop && mkdir -p /workspaces/cloud-firefox/.mozilla
